title: General Secretary
description: Led a team of 50+ members, organized CTF competitions, workshops, and guest lectures from industry professionals.

title: Organizing Secretary
description: Coordinated a university-wide tech fest with 500+ participants, including hackathons, coding competitions, and security challenges.

title: CTF Team Captain
description: Lead competitive CTF team, achieving top 10 rankings in national competitions. Mentor junior members in web exploitation and reverse engineering.

title: Security Workshop Facilitator
description: Conduct monthly security awareness workshops for students and local businesses on topics like phishing prevention and password security.
